name: should create a splits query — year
description: Test case for should create a splits query — year
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "tfebb18e32f27865b60cbee2e11613cff" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN CAST(ROUND(SUM(rush_yds)::decimal / SUM(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS decimal) ELSE 0 END as rush_yds_per_att_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."xpass_prob" between 0 and 0.4 group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t91e4d98fe8e91cd2ca4f4825a7bcc53d" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (1, 2) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_0", "tfebb18e32f27865b60cbee2e11613cff"."rush_yds_per_att_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_per_att_from_plays_0", "t91e4d98fe8e91cd2ca4f4825a7bcc53d"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec" on "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."pid" = "player"."pid" and ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec.year = player_years.year and ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec.year IN (2020,2021,2022,2023) left join "tfebb18e32f27865b60cbee2e11613cff" on "tfebb18e32f27865b60cbee2e11613cff"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tfebb18e32f27865b60cbee2e11613cff"."year" = 2023 left join "t91e4d98fe8e91cd2ca4f4825a7bcc53d" on "t91e4d98fe8e91cd2ca4f4825a7bcc53d"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t91e4d98fe8e91cd2ca4f4825a7bcc53d.year = player_years.year and t91e4d98fe8e91cd2ca4f4825a7bcc53d.year IN (2020,2021,2022,2023) group by player.fname, player.lname, "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."rush_yds_from_plays", "tfebb18e32f27865b60cbee2e11613cff"."rush_yds_per_att_from_plays", "t91e4d98fe8e91cd2ca4f4825a7bcc53d"."rush_yds_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
